final_prompt.prompt:
Create a panoramic scroll artwork of the Tang Dynasty Chang'an City Lantern Festival.

Style/medium: needs a "工笔重彩" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 唐代仕女图 court painting tradition, 宋画长卷 narrative scroll format, 敦煌壁画 Tang-era color and gold-leaf heritage; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a long scroll panorama format capturing the full cityscape
Subject: must include ten thousand lanterns illuminating the night sky, the bustling festival scene of Chang'an
Scene/backdrop: must be Tang Dynasty Chang'an city during the Lantern Festival night
Lighting/mood: needs a festive night atmosphere with countless lantern glows — exact light distribution is yours
Color palette: needs a rich, saturated direction with mineral pigment intensity — exact pigment mixing is yours
Materials/textures: needs a silk-scroll painting surface treatment — exact brushwork texture is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve the long scroll (长卷) format, must show the scale of "万盏花灯"
Avoid:
